    • isInputForcedDown

      public final boolean isInputForcedDown(PathInput input)
      Returns whether or not we are forcing down the specified Input.
      参数:
      input - The input
      返回:
      Whether or not it is being forced down

    • setInputForceState

      public final void setInputForceState(PathInput input, boolean forced)
      Sets whether or not the specified Input is being forced down.
      参数:
      input - The Input
      forced - Whether or not the state is being forced
